title: Normalized Skill
description: Represents a single skill after normalization and categorization

raw.description: The original skill text extracted from the resume (e.g., 'React.js', 'ReactJS', 'JS')

normalized.description: The canonical skill name mapped via skill_normalizer.json (e.g., 'React', 'JavaScript')

category.description: The category the skill belongs to (e.g., 'frameworks', 'programming_languages', 'databases'). 'uncategorized' if unknown.

is_primary.description: True if the skill appears frequently or is listed in recent roles/projects

frequency.description: Number of times the skill appears across the entire resume (skills section + experience + projects)

last_used_year.description: The most recent year this skill was mentioned in an experience or project. Null if only found in the skills list.
